overall.description: A smooth 360-degree panoramic tour of a rustic medieval cabin interior from a video game engine, showcasing detailed wooden architecture with a stone fireplace, weapon racks, alchemy equipment, and living quarters. The camera completes a full sweep of the room, revealing the cozy, lived-in atmosphere of the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic kitchen with stone fireplace and weapon storage

agents.ego_description: slowly panning left to survey the kitchen area featuring a stone fireplace, weapon rack, and hanging copper cookware

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with stacked firewood to the side and a cooking pot hanging inside
wooden rack holding multiple swords and weapons against the log wall
several copper cooking pots hanging from ceiling hooks
neatly stacked pile of chopped firewood next to the fireplace
mounted deer antlers and skull above the fireplace
rustic wooden wall shelves holding various kitchen items

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rustic kitchen corner featuring a prominent stone fireplace with a mounted deer skull above it. Copper pots hang from the ceiling near a weapon rack holding several swords. The camera slowly pans left, revealing stacked firewood and wooden shelves against the log cabin walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: alchemy and crafting corner with stacked cauldrons

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan across the workbench area with alchemical equipment, stacked iron cauldrons, and crafting tools

entered.detail: three large black iron cauldrons stacked vertically near the window
wooden workbench with various bottles, tools, and an anvil-like surface

segments.scene_description: The view transitions to the back corner of the cabin featuring a stack of three large iron cauldrons and a wooden alchemy table cluttered with equipment. The fireplace and weapon rack exit view as the camera continues its leftward sweep, while the wooden shelves recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: sleeping quarters with bed, crib, and writing desk

agents.ego_description: panning across the living area to reveal a wooden bed, baby's crib, and a cluttered writing desk near the large windows

entered.detail: simple wooden bed frame with blue blanket and white pillow
small wooden baby crib with vertical slats
wooden desk covered with papers, books, and a candelabra
large multi-paned window letting in bright natural light

segments.scene_description: The camera reveals the living quarters with a simple wooden bed and a small crib positioned near large windows that flood the space with natural light. A writing desk cluttered with papers and books occupies the right side of the frame as the alchemy equipment exits view.

scene_state.functional_zone: entryway with wooden door and coat rack

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic sweep to focus on the wooden entry door with a round window and an ornate iron coat rack

entered.detail: sturdy wooden entry door with iron hinges and a round window
ornate iron coat rack with multiple hooks standing near the door
small multi-paned window next to the entry door
tall wooden shelves holding pots and storage containers

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the entryway featuring a sturdy wooden door with a round window and an ornate iron coat rack. Storage shelves line the left wall while the bedroom furniture exits view, completing the circular survey of the rustic cabin interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous circular pan through a rustic medieval cabin, moving from a functional hearth and armory toward the intimate living and entry areas. It begins in a kitchen corner centered on a stone fireplace with a mounted deer skull and hanging copper pots, slowly panning left past a weapon rack and stacked firewood. As the camera continues its sweep, the hearth recedes to reveal a cluttered alchemy station featuring large iron cauldrons and a wooden workbench. The view then shifts toward the living quarters, where the alchemy equipment gives way to a simple bed, a small crib, and a writing desk bathed in natural light from large windows. Finally, the camera glides past the bedroom furniture to focus on the entryway, concluding the survey at a sturdy wooden door and an ornate iron coat rack.
